name: Bacon Chicken Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the cooked chicken in a casserole dish.
2. Arrange the cooked bacon slices on top of the chicken.
3. Mix the cream of chicken soup with 1/2 cup water.
4. Spread the mixture evenly over the chicken.
5. Sprinkle seasonings (dried tarragon, garlic powder, salt, and pepper) to taste.
6. Top with seasoned bread crumbs.
7. Bake at 400°F for 40 minutes.
